item.title: One year after the July 4 flood, Kerr County shows signs of trauma and healing
item.description: Crider’s dance hall is back. Homes are rebuilt. Kids swim in the river. But there’s also deep grief after the river killed 119 people and traumatized more.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Supreme Court decision loosening campaign finance rules could be boon for Paxton in Senate race
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Watch a Tribune symposium with Texas educators on “What makes a great school?”
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Where is screwworm in Texas? Track cases here.
item.dc:creator: Berenice Garcia

item.title: On the upper Texas coast, many petrochemical facilities may not be prepared for fiercer storms
item.dc:creator: Public Health Watch

item.title: Gov. Greg Abbott calls for ban on data center development in rural Texas neighborhoods
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Corpus Christi declines to seek federal grant for long-debated water desalination plant
item.description: City Council members traded insults before the 5-4 vote blocked an effort to apply for up to $120 million in federal grants to help build the treatment plant.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: TribCast: Can Ted Cruz save college sports?
item.description: Texas politics have become deeply engaged in the fight over the future of college football. We discuss the saga of Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby, the influence of megadonor Cody Campbell and U.S. Ted Cruz’s proposed fix.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: First-of-its-kind GOP midterm convention coming to Dallas in September, Trump says
item.description: The Republican National Committee has not yet announced the midterm convention or its location, but it has teased the event as an opportunity to put Trump on the ballot.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Elected Officials Directory
item.description: To help Texans know more about their representatives, we’ve gathered the bios, contact information and more for the occupants of the state’s highest offices.

item.title: Government Salaries Explorer
item.description: Review the compensation of hundreds of thousands of state and municipal employees in Texas.

item.title: Texas Public Schools Explorer
item.description: Review enrollment trends, demographics, teacher experience, pay and outcomes for all schools, and more.
